Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace Docling with PyMuPDF for text extraction

Docling loads ML models which makes extraction slow \(~10-30s per document\).
PyMuPDF uses programmatic PDF parsing instead, reducing extraction to ~170ms.

- Text extraction via fitz.get_text\("dict"\) with bounding boxes
- Font-based heuristics classify blocks as Title/SectionHeader/List/Text
- Table detection via PyMuPDF''s find_tables\(\)
- On-demand page rendering with pypdfium2 \(no longer caches all pages in memory\)
- Async endpoints with thread pool executors
- DOCX/PPTX support via MS Office COM conversion to PDF

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix race condition when switching documents during loading

When clicking a new document while the previous one was still loading,
the stale response could overwrite the new document''s data, showing
incorrect bounding boxes. Use AbortController to cancel in-flight
fetches when the selected document changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
